'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=H5gVtZ_T3x445ObzQ96a2qp3ko07s67cYIMQv.lzTLQ-1775930034-1.0.1.1-XQSS1YlGQQpkagd3w5Y0.9hGqdVbrFHRgcnRXRyWtRo"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
